title: Sour Patch Cinnamon Swirl Buns
description: Soft, fluffy buns filled with a sweet and sour patch filling, topped with a crunchy cinnamon sugar mixture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, yeast, and salt.
Add the warm milk and melted butter, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour.
On a floured surface, roll out the dough to a 1/4-inch thickness.
Sprinkle the crushed Sour Patch and cinnamon sugar mixture evenly over the dough.
Roll the dough into a tight log, cut into 12 equal pieces.
Place the buns on a parchment-lined baking sheet, cover, and let rise for 30 minutes.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before serving.
